title: microsorum lastii
intro: Microsorum lastii, also known as Last's fern or Last's microsorum, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microsorum lastii include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, as well as promoting wound healing and improving skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often dried and used in infusions, teas, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
